commit.message:
Fix slots API — remove broken usernameList parameter

Cal.com v2 slots API does not support usernameList filtering.
Every slot fetch with a provider selected was silently returning a 400
error, causing "No availability" to show for all services.

Removed usernameList from getAvailableSlots(), the slots API endpoint,
and CalendarView. Combined with the Placentia slug fix, this means:
- Placentia bookings now use the correct event type (range-iv-placentia)
- All slot fetches actually succeed now

Provider-specific booking is still enforced at booking time via hostUserId.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move GetHealth01 guard before super call in SurvivorAnims patch

The guard was after super.ModCommandHandlerAfter(), so the entire
mod chain still ran GetHealth01 on AI proxies before our guard.
Moving it before super blocks ALL client-side command handler
processing on non-local entities, eliminating the 88+ GetHealth01
errors that destabilize the engine and cause downstream crashes
like WeaponManager::GetCurrentModeName access violations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: complete UI overhaul — polished, engaging design system

- Tailwind config: brand/success/streak/surface color palettes,
  custom shadows (soft, card, glow), animations (fade-in, slide-up,
  bounce-dot, pulse-soft, scale-in, confetti)
- Dark mode: class-based toggle with localStorage persistence,
  flash prevention script in layout
- TopNav: sticky nav with logo, route links, dark mode toggle, avatar
- Profile picker: redesigned with gradient background, logo, animations
- Dashboard: motivational micro-copy, card-style quick links with emojis,
  StreakDisplay with flame icon + glow, DomainCard with SVG progress rings,
  WeeklySummary with design tokens
- Chat: tutor bubbles (surface-100, rounded-tl-md), student bubbles
  (brand-600, rounded-tr-md), large tappable ChoiceButtons with letter
  circles, polished TypingIndicator with staggered bounce-dot
- Writing: EssayEditor with generous line-height, calm circular
  CountdownTimer (SVG ring), polished StagedFeedback
- Reading: PassageReader with shadow-card, ReadingStaminaSession phases
- Simulation/mistakes/teach-back: consistent design system throughout
- All components: soft backgrounds (#f8fafc/#0f172a), custom scrollbar,
  selection colors, rounded-2xl corners, subtle shadows
- Fully responsive with iPad landscape support
- Framer Motion installed (ready for page transitions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

WUHU-0070: Session cost control and safe auto-restart (#44)

* WUHU-0070: Session cost control and safe auto-restart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* WUHU-0070: Address review feedback — runtime config for resumed sessions, pricing coverage, limit clearing, resolved model pricing

1. resumeRunningSessions: configure tools + stream fn on runtime before
   ensureStarted, matching the enqueue(...) path so restored sessions
   see the full toolset and logged stream wrapper.

2. WuhuPricingTable: add entries for all models in WuhuModelCatalog
   (codex-mini-latest, gpt-5.3-codex, openai-codex gpt-5.1/5.2,
   openai codex variants, 1M context aliases) so fallback pricing
   is never hit for known models.

3. updateCostLimit: when effective limit is nil, send .limitCleared
   action so the loop removes the budget constraint and unpauses.
   New CostAction.limitCleared case handled in ReduceCost.

4. InferenceEffect: use message.model (resolved ID from PiAI response)
   instead of session.model (possibly an alias) for live cost tracking,
   matching the restart recomputation path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* WUHU-0070: Apply fallback cost limit ($10) when YAML key is absent

Without this, Codable decoding leaves defaultCostLimitCents as nil when
the key is missing from server.yml, defeating the cost safety net.

- load() applies fallbackCostLimitCents (100,000 = $10) when key absent
- Explicit 0 in config means 'disable cost gating' (normalized to nil)
- Tests for absent, zero, and explicit value cases

* WUHU-0070: Use dollars in YAML config for cost limit

The YAML key is now `default_cost_limit` in dollars (e.g. 10, 2.50)
instead of `default_cost_limit_cents` in hundredths-of-a-cent.
load() converts to the internal Int64 unit automatically.

- Key absent → $10 fallback
- Explicit 0 → disable cost gating (nil)
- Fractional dollars supported (e.g. 2.50 = $2.50)

---------

Co-authored-by: Minsheng Liu <minsheng@wuhu.dev>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(compiler): cover Compile() error paths — parse, resolve, generate (#24)

Adds compile_errors_test.go with 6 tests covering the error branches in
Compile() that were previously at 0% coverage (compiler.go: 58.8% → 76.5%):

Parse errors:
  - TestCompile_MissingSpecFile: non-existent spec path → "parse" error
  - TestCompile_InvalidSpecYAML: malformed YAML → "parse" error
  - TestCompile_SpecFailsValidation: missing apiVersion → "parse" error

Resolve errors:
  - TestCompile_UnknownComponentInSpec: unregistered component → error
    mentioning the component name (caught at validation or resolve layer)
  - TestCompile_ResolverVersionMismatch: StubRegistry knows only v1.0.0;
    spec requests v9.9.9 → "resolve" error

Generate errors:
  - TestCompile_UnwritableOutputDir: read-only parent directory causes
    MkdirAll to fail → "generate" error (skipped when running as root)

Raises overall compiler package coverage from 84.8% → 86.1%.

repository.description: Playwright-based testing and eval framework for MCP servers with LLM-as-a-judge

commit.message:
fix(print): eliminate 30s hang and disable Print button while calculating

Two root causes for "print unavailable" after 30 seconds:

1. OSRM timeout retry loop: when avoidTolls/scenicMode was enabled,
   a timed-out OSRM call (15s) would silently retry without the exclude
   param — also timing out (15s) — for 30s total before failing.
   Fixed by re-throwing DOMException from fetchOSRMRoute so calculateRoute
   skips the retry on timeout (server slow = retrying won't help).

2. Nominatim had no timeout: enrichSmartStopHubs called reverseGeocodeTown
   without a signal, so Nominatim fetches could hang indefinitely after
   the OSRM timeout. Added AbortSignal.timeout(5000) default, matching
   the existing weather fetch pattern.

UX: Print button now disabled (grayed out) while isCalculating is true
or before the first successful calculation, eliminating the confusing
"trip timeline not ready" toast entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sdk-client): implement ClaudeSDKClient migration (Phases 0-3) + defensive app_context guards

Migration from query() to persistent ClaudeSDKClient subprocess (2.15x speedup).
Feature-flagged via AGENT_PERSISTENT_SDK_CLIENT (default false, instant rollback).

Phases implemented:
- Phase 0: Infrastructure (client_pool.py, DC-2 fix, _parse_sdk_message extraction)
- Phase 1: Web streaming (dual path dispatch, ContextVar propagation, SSE parity)
- Phase 2: Interrupt (real client.interrupt() replacing 501 stub)
- Phase 3: Teams (submit_coroutine bridge, _safe_flush for daemon thread)

Defensive guards added to prevent silent app_context errors:
- sql_template_indexer: fix active bug (skill subprocess without context)
- ssw_indexer: add _has_app_context (eliminates redundant create_app in scheduler)
- route_template_indexer: add _has_app_context (future-proof)
- product_search: add _has_app_context (most exposed, 4+ importers)

Also fixes Pyright issues: fetchone() null check, unused enumerate variable.

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): reuse coalesce expression to fix GROUP BY bind param mismatch

SQLAlchemy generated different bind parameters ($1 vs $5) for the same
coalesce expression in SELECT and GROUP BY, causing PostgreSQL to reject
the query. Reusing a single expression object ensures one bind parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: #136 phase 1 — per-channel thread context buffers

Each network source+channel gets an independent conversation buffer
(dict keyed on f"{source}:{channel_id/user/client_id}").

_get_thread_id()  — stable composite key from NetworkMessage
_get_thread_context_prefix()  — last N exchanges as context preamble
_update_thread_buffer()  — record completed exchange; cap at MAX_HISTORY
_evict_stale_threads()  — purge idle buffers after THREAD_IDLE_TTL_SEC (1h)

Thread context injected as preamble to synthetic input before _process().
Skipped for CC machine-to-machine channel and slash commands.

Each Discord channel / web session / email sender now maintains isolated
conversation history without cross-contaminating other threads or the
global ring memory.

commit.message:
fix: WS reconnect on Azure InitialSilenceTimeout + configurable recording duration

Root cause: Azure kills STT WebSocket after ~15s silence during TTS playback
(InitialSilenceTimeout). All post-TTS audio sent to dead WS was silently lost,
causing intermittent "no speech detected" failures.

Fixes:
- Detect turn.end during recording → mark WS dead, invalidate cached connection
- Start fresh WS STT session after TTS if old one died, replay buffered frames
- Buffer mic frames captured after WS death during TTS for replay
- REST STT fallback if WS returns nothing (safety net)
- Recording timer now counts post-TTS frames only (TTS duration doesn't eat
  into recording time), with 3x hard safety cap
- max_record_seconds configurable (default 120, range 5-300)
- End word also checked on confirmed phrases (not just hypotheses)
- Comprehensive debug logging around WS send/recv/drain/reconnect path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(coverage): close critical gaps — verifyAuditHash, irTypeToSQL, hookCallSite (#23)

Raises compiler package coverage from 78.6% → 84.8% by targeting three
functions that had zero or partial coverage:

verifyAuditHash (0% → 90%) — security-critical audit integrity check:
  - TestVerifyAuditHash_Match: computes correct SHA-256, verify passes
  - TestVerifyAuditHash_Mismatch: wrong hash in registry → "hash mismatch" error
  - TestVerifyAuditHash_MissingSourceDirectory: missing source tree → walking error

irTypeToSQL (72.7% → 100%) — SQL type mapping for all IR field types:
  - Exhaustive table test covering all 8 type branches: string (TEXT/VARCHAR),
    int/integer (INTEGER), int64 (BIGINT), bool/boolean (BOOLEAN),
    float/float64 (DOUBLE PRECISION), timestamp (TIMESTAMP), uuid (UUID),
    and the default catch-all (TEXT for unknown types)

hookCallSite (72.7% → 100%) — typed call site rendering for all hook points:
  - TestHookCallSite_PrePublish: pre-publish → EventMessage parameters
  - TestHookCallSite_PostConsume: post-consume → ConsumedEvent parameters
  - TestHookCallSite_Default: unknown point → minimal HookContext-only fallback
  - TestHookCallSite_KnownPoints_Coverage: table test for all 6 valid points

commit.message:
fix: use afterFiles identity rewrite for NextAuth + fix keyClue i18n

Replace fallback rewrite with afterFiles + identity rewrite approach:
- First rule: /api/auth/* → /api/auth/* (identity, keeps local for NextAuth)
- Second rule: /api/* → backend proxy (unchanged behavior)
This is safer than fallback which could be intercepted by [locale] routes.

Also fix practice.explanation.keyClue → explanation.keyClue i18n path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: add Vietnamese cspell dictionary + spell check to CI

- Install @cspell/dict-vi-vn for Vietnamese language support
- Set language: "en,vi" so Vietnamese words pass spell check
- Remove file-level ignorePaths workarounds
- Add spell check step to CI workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement Serverless Framework configs and tests for all 8 scenarios

Populates serverless.yml files with SLS v3 structure and handler.py
for Lambda scenarios. Tests deploy via inline CFN templates as fallback
when sls CLI unavailable. ~30 test methods across 8 files.

Scenarios: rest_api, static_website, event_pipeline, data_lake,
auth_stack, monitoring, vpc_network, cicd_pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: #50 phase 1 — NE word graph prediction pre-warms memory retrieval

ProspectivePrediction gains predicted_search_keys: word graph predict_next()
runs on recent TWM context window before user input arrives, exposing top
co-occurring topics (filtered: len>3, no bigrams, no stop words).

prospective_pass() now accepts word_graph parameter and populates
predicted_search_keys from these predictions.

main.py: NE predicted keys merged into memory search query on both the
fast-path (skip_llm_preparse) and slow-path (parallel preparse) branches.
NE starts pulling relevant context before the input is fully parsed —
parsing and cognition begin sharing the same retrieval signal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: TheIgors
repository.description: The Igors

commit.message:
feat: add void subcommand to remove last review entry

- `melete void TOPIC [--dry-run]` removes the last review_log entry for
  a topic and restores the card's FSRS scheduling state to before that
  review was applied
- adds `card_snapshot: Option<PyCard>` to ReviewEntry so each review
  stores the pre-review card state for future voids
- `cmd_record` now persists the pre-review card as card_snapshot on each
  new ReviewEntry
- handles three cases: no history (exit 1), exactly one entry (card
  removed → new state), 2+ entries (snapshot restored)
- also fixes pre-existing test bug: raw string literal with escaped
  quotes produced invalid JSON in parse_py_card_json_string test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add new pages, PSI monitoring, SEO/A11y/Perf improvements

- Add /media, /faqs, /voices pages with OGP/Twitter meta
- Add PSI check script (scripts/psi-check.mjs) with severity icons,
  [FIXABLE]/[EXTERNAL] tags, --details flag, and npm run checkpsi
- Fix A11y contrast issues across all pages (opacity, link colors, gray text)
- Add cache headers in .htaccess (1yr static, 0 HTML/XML)
- Add hero image preload with responsive media queries
- Add mobile-optimized hero images (hero-bg*-sp.webp)
- Fix heading hierarchy (h3->h2 in faqs/contact)
- Remove duplicate SEO meta from app.html (per-page svelte:head)
- Set trailingSlash: 'always' in +layout.js
- Update sitemap.xml with all pages and trailing slashes
- Clean up robots.txt
- Add access-map width/height for CLS improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
